title: Why Your Arms Are Still Small (The Tricep Secret)
description:
Top doing endless bicep curls. If you want to fill your sleeves, you need to know the math: The Tricep is 2/3 of your arm. 📐
Ignore the back of the arm, and you will always have "noodle arms."

THE 3-MOVE ARM BLUEPRINT: 
1️⃣ Overhead Extensions: Target the long head for massive size. 
2️⃣ Incline Curls: The stretch at the bottom builds the peak. 
3️⃣ Cross-Body Hammer Curls: Forces the arm to look wide from the front.

Save this routine for your next Arm Day. 💪
Subscribe for more science-based gains!


#Shorts #ArmDay #Triceps #Biceps #BiggerArms #GymTips #Bodybuilding
